transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang, I have Fire Demon Ramyun (Or "The Devil of Fire")
Just to show you guys how spicy this is,
The Fire Chicken Noodles' Scoville unit is at like 3000 or like 4000
But this one is 14,444 Scoville units
This is basically the spiciest ramyun in the world
Before I eat it, I need to coat my stomach with this
Melon flavor
I have some milk over here as well
Just in case
This is leek kimchi and napa cabbage kimchi
This is the Fire Demon Yes, this is the spicy one
I usually cook 4 at a time, but I'm going to cook only 3 this time because I'm scared
What is this?
The sauce packet looks so scary
The powder is..

It looks weird Look at this
It's thick Some thick pepper powder
I'm not too good at eating spicy food these days, but I used to be really good at it
I only put 1 sauce packet in the water that was for 3 packs and it's already red
Wait, my nose is getting itchy
Please come out (sneeze)
It's not coming out
Bon appetit
Should I try the soup first?
What is this!?
Tbh, I underestimated all ramyun noodles with soup
that they are not spicy
But this one hits right away
It's tasty though
It's very spicy
The noodles are more like Neoguri (brand) noodles

I've never had this kind of soup before
My tongue is starting to get numb
Just like the malatang hot pot
It's really spicy
I saw some people eat this and they said it wasn't spicy
Their tolerance level is high I guess
I'll eat it with leek kimchi
It's killing me
People that like spicy food will enjoy this
Should I eat 3 more packs?
That's better
This is a crazy ramyun
Should I pour some milk inside?
Should I eat something else then?
I'm kinda hoping for that
I mean, I can tolerate spicy food

Really, I can continue
But since you guys don't want me to
I'll bring something else
Non-spicy noodles?
Bon appetit~
It's going to be yummy
Paldo Jjajangmyeon tastes so good (black bean noodles brand)
And look what we have here Some leek kimchi
It's going to be amazing
It's so good because it's been a while
There are a lot of different kinds of black bean noodles
But I like this one the best
So delicious
I should've made more
Should've cooked 8 packs
I'm already almost done with it Are you forreal!?

I don't eat that much these days
I eat the right amount
Let's put some white rice in here
Jjajang rice!
It's so much better than the 3-minute black bean sauce (brand)
Really
Kimchi goes so well with the jjajang rice
Yum
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
